title: Welcome to Patriots For Action
excerpt: What this PAC hub is, what it is not, and how to stay connected.
author: Patriots For Action
bodyMarkdown:
We built this site to keep supporters informed and equipped.

### What you’ll find here

- Events you can attend
- Updates you can share
- Ways to volunteer or donate

County-level involvement lives on the Texas hub at **PatriotsInActionTX.com**.

title: How to submit an event
excerpt: Here’s how to share local activity with the team.
author: Patriots For Action
bodyMarkdown:
Share what’s happening by joining the community and posting the details there. For county-level involvement, use the Texas hub site. If you need to reach the statewide team, use the Contact page.

### What to include

- Title and start time
- Location or virtual link
- A short summary
- Registration link
